text.title: rust-testing-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the rust-testing-integration methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Parallel integration tests bind 127.0.0.1:8080 and one fails with EADDRINUSE.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used a real listener instead of oneshot.
antipattern.fix: Replace bind/await with app.oneshot(request).await — drives the router in-process.

antipattern.symptom: Test A inserts a user; test B asserts count is 0 and fails non-deterministically.
antipattern.fix: Add a fixture that CREATE SCHEMA test_<uuid>, runs migrations, and DROPs on teardown.

antipattern.symptom: Postgres container starts empty; test panics with 'relation users does not exist'.
antipattern.root-cause: Test setup called pool but never ran migrations.

antipattern.symptom: Adding a JSON field forces 50 tests to update hand-written expected strings.
antipattern.fix: Replace with insta::assert_json_snapshot!; review the .snap file in the PR.
